turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: I want to practise asking follow-up questions and clarifying details in a housing enquiry. You are a real estate agent in a rental agency office. I’ll play the role of a prospective tenant. Please create a realistic and authentic conversation about attending a rental inspection and following up on an application. Respond as if this were a real conversation. Please ask questions, offer options, provide feedback, clarify, keep the conversation going, and help me develop a confident, fluent interaction.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Hi, I’m interested in the two-bedroom unit on Main Street. Is it still available?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Good morning! Yes, the two-bedroom unit on Main Street is still available. It’s a ground-floor apartment near the train station. Have you had a chance to view it yet?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Not yet. Are there any inspection times this weekend?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, we have an open inspection on Saturday from  to  a.m., and another on Sunday at  p.m. Would you like to attend either?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Saturday at 10 a.m. works for me. May I ask a question, are pets allowed?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Unfortunately, pets aren't permitted in this building — it's covered by strict body corporate rules. But we do have other listings that are pet-friendly if you're interested.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: I see. I’ll attend the inspection on Saturday. Also, I’m also interested in another unit — could I apply for both?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, you can apply for multiple properties. Each application is considered separately, so it’s a good idea if you're deciding between options. We’ll assess them based on your documents and availability.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Great. What documents do I need to include with my application?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: You’ll need photo ID, proof of income — such as payslips or Centrelink letters — and rental references. If you don’t have rental history in Australia, we can accept character references, such as from an employer or university lecturer. Me : I understand. How long does it take to hear back?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Usually within 48 to 72 hours. If we receive multiple applications, it may take a little longer. We’ll notify you by email with the result.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: You're very welcome. Feel free to reach out with any other questions. Have a great day, and see you on Saturday!
